message:
feat(tui): add time-travel diff markers on main list rows

When a time-travel diff is active (user entered a git ref), main list
rows now show colored diff tags:
- NEW (green) — issue didn't exist in the reference snapshot
- MOD (yellow) — issue was modified since the reference
- CLO (dim) — issue was closed since the reference
- RE! (red) — issue was reopened since the reference

Tags appear as scan-line suffix chips using the existing diff data from
time_travel_diff. The issue_diff_tag() method checks new/reopened/
modified/closed issue lists in the SnapshotDiff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
